evidence_summary: Execute a high-impact physical feat to pivot the narrative from pursuit to discovery. The sequence must emphasize the protagonist's superhuman agility through scale and trajectory, establishing his new status relative to the martian_warriors.

To escape, the protagonist performs a massive thirty-foot leap, landing on the far side of the enclosure. The Martians witness this feat, shifting their view of him from prey to a "wonderful discovery."

The protagonist executes a massive leap to clear the enclosure boundary.
